author: TonyMontana
content:
2 things:

1- I know i say this often however, you guys have seen over and over no hindsight. real trading in real time, laid out the plan on TSLA this morning and perfectly executed. in the last month and a half 1 red day, why? because I follow my system religiously. I don’t care when I see something ripping because I know I’ll catch a better move if I follow my system in the following days.

2- it’s easy to say your greeen for how long I have been when u take 4-6 trades a day. however, you guys noticed, 1-2 trades MAX on the day. I never have more than this, why? I prioritize quality trades over quantity.

The faster you learn these things the better you’ll be.

content:
I usually don’t talk about swings too much.

In terms of swing positions you have to be OKAY with letting the trade be in drawdown 50-60% sometimes (just how it is with options)

Therefore you usually want to use weeks profits or less to enter into swing trades and look for a bit more percentage return.

I personally have a swing account and a trading account so it doesn’t mess with my psychology intraday.

However, with this being said I just took…

AAPL 230 CALLS AUG 30

Risk is below 4 hour consolidation.

Targets are previous HOD & 231.

Risk accordingly.

author: TonyMontana
content:
It’s important to remember.

Today is FRIDAY.

Taking a low quality trade today is the WORST day to take one.

Why?

Because:

1- 0DTE, you’ll lose more.

2- Weekend, you’ll think about the loss all weekend no matter how well you traded this week.

So it’s very important don’t be someone who ruins their good week because you “want” to enter a trade! 

@everyone

author: TonyMontana
content:
I know some people are talking about FOMO right now.

Here’s a perspective.

For myself on Friday I was estatic (ofc I hit a $130k trade) biggest of my career.

But guess what?

The stock ran another 11-12% today.

With the trailers I had this was an extra $25-35k if I rolled them into this week.

If I held my full position (NOT SAYING I WOULD AT ALL) it would be a $1mill + swing.

Think about that.

However, I don’t care.

Why?

Our job as traders is NOT to catch the whole move.

It’s to catch the the highest probability chunk.

I was able to do this and document it for you guys.

But no matter if you’re the best trader in the world you will have feelings and you will NOT catch all the moves.

Observe, learn and refine that’s all we can do.

Hope this helps some people from not full porting to chase TSLA gains.

@everyone

author: TonyMontana
content:
Imo, it’s tough PA to trade when htf is bullish but intraday pa is bearish.

This is what we are seeing today.

I don’t like this.

Yesterday we had CLEAR trades.

Came in with NVDA focused trade and executed.

Today more choppy and not aligning with HTF.

The best thing for today for me is to look for potential swings setups to form rather than force a short day trade just for the sake of taking a trade.

Will be scanning for swings today and will let you know if I see anything.

In terms of day trades I personally wouldn’t want to go short on anything when everything is HTF bullish because that’s when you see those v shape recoveries and get stuck!

Hope this clears some stuff up for people and what to focus on!

@everyone

author: TonyMontana
content:
I lost $30k trying to learn trading.

It was my full networth 5 years ago.

Blessed to be able to call $30k just another week now.

As a new trader start with SMALL size, LEARN the skill (your in the right community), and most importantly embrace the losses as lessons.

It can be hard seeing others win when you’re losing.

It can also be hard remaining grounded when you’re winning.

In this room our message is clear:

We are NOT a signal service but we are an educational community. 

We want traders to come in and SEE how we view the markets, not to just enter because we are.

With this being said, these last couple months we have seen fantastic results and I’m glad you are able to see both the WINS & LOSSES in real time.

Hope yall had a good week.

I’ll catch you in the trade review tonight.

author: TonyMontana
content:
$50k week.

The goal for 2025 was to size up.

Why?

My winrate and trading performance told me it was time last year.

I waited for the new year however for more clean price action after the last 2 weeks of 2024.

Now, the results you see were built over the last 7 years.

Stay small, learn the skill, once you master it then and only then size up.

Like I always say the results will come once the skill is mastered.

This applies in trading, business or any other avenue.

Most important thing you can do in 2025 is keep learning and refining.

Focus on the process of executing and not how much you win or lose.

Keep learning and don’t quit.

Happy long weekend🫶🏻

@everyone

author: TonyMontana
content:
It’s important to remember.

You guys see the good & bad.

This is the SAME trade as yesterday we took on GOOGL.

Literally the SAME.

This one worked and ran extremely nicely.

Yesterday it didn’t work.

For new traders because this setup didn’t work yesterday they’d assume the “strategy” doesn’t work.

No.

The market is all probability based.

I said yesterday it was a good setup, probability just didn’t work and hopefully today you see that.

Same setup, same entry, however nice move to the upside.

I always say this:

process focused traders will make more in the long run than result focused traders.

@everyone

author: TonyMontana
content:
Today’s market with 0DTE is DESIGNED for you to lose money.

Even if you take something like this TSLA trade: 👇

If it worked, your theta on cons would eat them up.

So yes, you may win the trade but the cons will barely move.

Important to know when to play defence compared to offence.

Last couple weeks have been really good , but it’s important to know they have been good due to HTF thesis.

Which in the last 2 days have been present but not respected.

Read this twice.

author: TonyMontana
content:
Something that’s cool to me that I wanted to share.

My main goal with trading was always to make money for freedom.

To do whatever I wanted whenever I wanted.

Today, I had to come across the country for a couple days for an urgent matter.

However with the time zone difference I am done the day at 6:55AM within 30 minutes.

$8k on the day.

I say this for those who are in here, you just have to show up everyday looking to be the best trader.

Don’t focus if someone else made $1k or $100k just slowly chip away at your own trading and you will see the numbers you want long term.

Let’s keep crushing team!

@everyone

Panic, blame the market, blame my broker?

PATIENCE IS KEY.

Everything is opening in the MIDDLE of the range.

Gameplan:

- which way is qqq/spy moving?
- focus on stock showing relative strength / weakness
- execute break and retest.

Let’s follow this plan today and stay patient!

author: TonyMontana
content:
This is why patience is key guys.

Demonstrated infront of you.

Lost first TSLA trade -$2,900 

Didn’t freak out, instead zoomed out and looked at what the market needed to do

(Spy break)

Once we got that, got back into the same TSLA trade using the 84% rule we have and executed with a clear plan.

2nd trade so far +$6,000

Putting me at +$3k on the day.

Why?

Good risk management, discipline to execute my setup, patience and most importantly NOT blaming the market but rather seeing the bigger picture.

@everyone

Simply can’t get better than that.

author: TonyMontana
content:
Hey guys!

Want to make one thing clear,

if you are RED today DO NOT be upset.

Look at the price action in the pic below.

That's QQQ.

It did NOTHING.

All range / chop action, every hod/lod came back in the range.

It was a difficult day to trade, the market always has cycles where it's very easy (last 2-3 months) then it will get difficult for 1-2 weeks and then it'll go back.

Once you understand these cycles you'll learn when to be aggressive and defensive OR when to play HTF vs LTF.

With this being said tonight's youtube video will help alot of you guys out that got caught up in the chop.

5PM EST, see y'all then!

(Trade review coming out tn as well)

Here’s what I want you guys to do:

draw a box for the first 5 minute range.

In between this box DON’T trade anything just observe price action.

ONLY once we break out of the box we can look for a trade.

This will help us sit out of chop.

@everyone

author: TonyMontana
content:
Do this for ANY stock your trading today.

@everyone

author: TonyMontana
content:
Now it’s simple.

We wait for box to break and look for a trade.

We just set ourselves up where we don’t have to look at every 1 minute candle anymore.

Let the trade come to us.

But the patience paid off as this is technically the “quickest” I’ve made $60k ever.

Just goes to show the relative strength in TSLA.

Don’t FOMO up here by the way, move already happened, can it move higher? Yes, but risk/reward up here you have to be much more aggressive with scale outs that won’t make it worth the risk.

For anyone holding just hold with market structure in mind.

author: TonyMontana
content:
**$75,000 Week Reflection**

I've never done this but since I didn't take a trade today I wanted to try something new.

When I started trading it was solely for money.

Yes, people will say it's for a noble cause, family, helping people, etc...

No.

We all start trading to make money, this is the reality.

The noble causes we use the money for come after, don't get that confused because I've been able to help many people **after seeing consistency**

However, in this chase we often feel behind.

Some of you may be making $10k/month while looking at my P&L and think "I NEED to do more"

Some of you I've spoken to personally making $50k/month and you think your behind.

Others of you may have just joined and still unprofitable.

At the end of the day, I know we are all here to make money and grow not only as traders but people because trading will truly expose your real self.

With this being said, let's try something new tomorrow.

Let's go into the day (all of us) without P&L on screen.

Remove your profit and loss screen from trading.

So all we see is the entry (if trade sets up) and exit.

We simply trade the chart, no emotions involved. 

If we win, fantastic

If we lose, fantastic

I think if 90% of people add this small tweak in their trading it would help tremendously.

It will show you a new perspective of trading the CHART with no bias.

If you like it, you can do it next week as well.

See y'all tomorrow. 

@everyone

content:
1 & done quick 25 minute trade.

$500 on the day.

You guys have seen me make $100k in a day.

$500 in a day.

& even lose $20k+ in a day.

In trading you have to know the right time to push & the right time to pull back.

Right now is the time to pull back with holidays and low volume market.

The market will be right back full force starting January.

We just have to have the patience to make sure we are mentally prepared for that.

With this being said, if your trading rest of the day stay safe, don’t oversize, & be CAREFUL.

@everyone

author: TonyMontana
content:
Today was one of those days where every single trade I took worked and the thesis was right but timing was off.

This will happen from time to time where you can see after we traded every single trade hit profit target.

It’s important to not let that cloud your ability to trade.

Could I have entered those reclaims and make my money back.

Yes, I knew PLTR was gonna hit HOD with high prob after that 5m pullback.

But for me what’s more important:

Hoping to win my money back or following my rules every single day and letting the money come based off the process of those actions.

The answer is following my rules.

Great lesson today.
